video.title: Why AI workout feedback is just a frustrating gimmick 🤖
video.description:
It turns out that relying on artificial intelligence for form correction is far less impressive than the marketing suggests. The frustration of spending more time calibrating camera angles than actually lifting weights makes automated coaching feel like a downgrade rather than an upgrade. Experience highlights exactly why these high-tech features often end up being more trouble than they are worth, leaving serious lifters better off sticking to the basics.
#FitnessTech #HomeGym #Speediance #Voltra #Tonal #fitness #homegym #techfails #workouttips #tonal #speediance #digitalgym #gymtech
